summary: Russian forces are conducting a broad offensive surge across multiple eastern and northern axes including Lyman, Kupyansk, and Sloviansk directions according to Ukrainian OS spokesman Terebov. Russian drone strikes targeted civilian infrastructure including a gas station near Sumy and a beach in Zaporizhzhia, causing civilian casualties including children. Ukraine claims strikes on a Russian naval ammunition depot near St. Petersburg destroyed over 60,000 tons of munitions, while Russia reported a drone attack collapsed an apartment entrance in Gorlovka killing three.
key_points: Russian forces are escalating offensive activity across Lyman, Kupyansk, South-Slobozhansk, and North-Slobozhansk axes according to Ukrainian OS spokesman Viktor Terebov. (Source: @UkraineNow/82138)

Mandatory evacuations declared for 12 border settlements in Chernigov region effective July 1 on military request, with continued evacuations from seven additional villages. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31142)
Russian drone attacks hit a gas station near Sumy injuring three civilians and struck a beach in Zaporizhzhia injuring four including three children. (Source: @UkraineNow/82145)

Ukraine claims strikes destroyed over 60,000 tons of Russian naval ammunition at a Baltic Fleet arsenal near St. Petersburg, and that Russia is relocating air defense systems to Moscow and Kerch Bridge area. (Source: @UkraineNow/82148)

Russian drone attack on a five-story building in Gorlovka collapsed an apartment entrance killing three people; 10 residents were in the affected section at time of impact. (Source: @tass_agency/382224)

US Department of Defense will create two training grounds to simulate Ukraine conflict conditions for electronic warfare training and joint work between drone manufacturers and countermeasure developers. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31121)
Russian 'Geranium' drones struck railway trains transporting military supplies for Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Kharkov region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31135)

President Zelensky stated Belarusian relay equipment helping Russia adjust fire on Ukraine stopped operating from June 22; he gave Lukashenko an ultimatum to disable it within a week. (Source: @UkraineNow/82151)

sections.executive_summary: Russian forces are conducting a broad offensive surge across multiple eastern and northern axes including Lyman, Kupyansk, South-Slobozhansk, and North-Slobozhansk directions according to Ukrainian OS spokesman Terebov. Russian drone strikes targeted civilian infrastructure including a gas station near Sumy and a beach in Zaporizhzhia, causing civilian casualties including children. Ukraine claims strikes on a Russian naval ammunition depot near St. Petersburg destroyed over 60,000 tons of munitions, while Russia reported a drone attack collapsed an apartment entrance in Gorlovka killing three.

points: Mandatory evacuations declared for 12 border settlements in Chernigov region effective July 1 on military request, with continued mandatory evacuations from seven additional border villages where winter evacuations had been announced. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31142)

At least 26 non-combat deaths of recruits in the 'Skala' assault regiment of the Ukrainian Armed Forces have occurred since end of 2025 due to beatings and abuse, with official causes listed as pneumonia and cardiovascular disease; the recruit camp was mined along the perimeter. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31118)

President Zelensky stated that Belarusian relay equipment used to help Russia adjust fire on Ukraine stopped operating from June 22; he gave Lukashenko an ultimatum to disable the equipment within a week or Ukraine would do it. (Source: @UkraineNow/82151)

Ukraine claims strikes destroyed over 60,000 tons of ammunition at a Russian Baltic Fleet arsenal near St. Petersburg; Zelensky stated Russia began relocating air defense systems from other regions to Moscow and Kerch Bridge area in response to Ukrainian strike threats. (Source: @UkraineNow/82148)
Russian 'Geranium' drones struck railway trains transporting military supplies for Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Kharkov region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31135)
Poland has begun denying temporary protection status to Ukrainians arriving from regions not affected by military action, according to Polish media reports. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31122)
The National Bank of Ukraine fined Ukrposhta 2.5 million hryvnias for violations in the payment market. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31140)
Russian forces liberated the village of Ivolzhanskoye in the Sumy region according to the Russian Ministry of Defense. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31132)

A drone attack on a five-story building in Gorlovka collapsed an apartment entrance killing three people according to Russian emergency services; 10 residents were in the affected section. (Source: @tass_agency/382224)

President Putin called the level of new Russian aircraft MC-21, SSJ-100, and Il-114 very good and stated Russia must increase domestic aviation production despite Western sanctions delaying the MC-21 program by two years. (Source: @tass_agency/382246)
Foreign Minister Lavrov stated that introduction of stabilization forces to Ukraine as proposed by Europeans would result in a new Berlin Wall. (Source: @tass_agency/382249)
A volunteer detachment called 'BARS' has been formed in Moscow with drone operator training taking place at a Ministry of Defense training ground. (Source: @tass_agency/382226)
The queue of vehicles on the Crimean Bridge grew to 899 cars with approximately three hours waiting time. (Source: @tass_agency/382258)

Ukrainian OS spokesman Terebov reported intensified Russian offensive activity across Lyman, Kupyansk, South-Slobozhansk, and North-Slobozhansk axes with Russian forces attempting more active operations. (Source: @UkraineNow/82138)
Russian 'Geranium' drones struck railway trains transporting military supplies for Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Kharkov region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31135)
Russian forces liberated the village of Ivolzhanskoye in the Sumy region according to the Russian Ministry of Defense. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31132)
A new group of Russian reactive drones was detected from Kursk Oblast heading toward the Sumy region. (Source: @kpszsu/66237)
Russian drone attacks hit a gas station on the outskirts of Sumy injuring three civilians who are receiving medical attention. (Source: @UkraineNow/82145)

Mandatory evacuations declared for 12 border settlements in Chernigov region effective July 1 on military request; the region borders Russia's Bryansk region and Belarus's Gomel region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31142)
Russian drones detected moving from northern Kharkov region toward Chuguyev, and from the north of Kharkov region toward Balakliya via Savintsy. (Source: @kpszsu/66182)
Russian drones detected northwest of Khotiny in Sumy region moving southwest toward Mykolaivka/Ulyanovka. (Source: @kpszsu/66233)
A new group of reactive drones from Kursk Oblast heading toward Sumy region was detected. (Source: @kpszsu/66237)
State Border Service of Ukraine stated there is currently no threat of invasion from Belarus but confirmed Minsk is helping Russia launch drones. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31138)

Russian drones detected moving from eastern Dnipropetrovsk region toward Shakhtersk and Pavlograd, and from the east of Dnipropetrovsk region toward northern Zaporizhzhia region. (Source: @kpszsu/66234)
Russian drones detected heading toward Zaporizhzhia city from the southeast. (Source: @kpszsu/66231)
Russian drones detected in the north of Zaporizhzhia region heading toward Novomykolaivka. (Source: @kpszsu/66234)
Russian attack on a beach in Zaporizhzhia injured four people including three children according to the Regional Military Administration. (Source: @UkraineNow/82150)
Russian drones detected on the north of Kherson region heading northeast. (Source: @kpszsu/66220)
A partial or complete blackout occurred across all districts of Kherson region according to Gauleiter Saldo. (Source: @UkraineNow/82143)

Multiple Russian drone groups detected across Kharkov region including reactive drones from Donetsk region heading toward Dnipropetrovsk in the direction of Pokrovsk, and a group through Bogodukhiv heading south. (Source: @kpszsu/66183)
Reactive drones detected from eastern Dnipropetrovsk region toward northern Zaporizhzhia region, and in Dnipropetrovsk region between Yavorntsy and Synelnykove. (Source: @kpszsu/66200)
A reactive drone was detected in Dnipropetrovsk region heading toward Sofiyivka, and another in the suburbs of Dnipro heading north. (Source: @eRadarrua/97990)
Ukraine claims strikes destroyed over 60,000 tons of ammunition at a Russian Baltic Fleet arsenal near St. Petersburg. (Source: @UkraineNow/82148)

US Department of Defense will create two training grounds to simulate Ukraine conflict conditions for electronic warfare and combat operations training, facilitating joint work between drone manufacturers and countermeasure developers. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31121)
A Russian drone attack on a five-story building in Gorlovka collapsed an apartment entrance killing three people. (Source: @tass_agency/382224)

key_developments: Russian forces are conducting intensified offensive operations across multiple axes including Lyman, Kupyansk, South-Slobozhansk, and North-Slobozhansk directions according to Ukrainian OS spokesman Terebov. (Source: @UkraineNow/82138)

Mandatory evacuations declared for 12 border settlements in Chernigov region effective July 1 on military request, with continued evacuations from seven additional villages. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31142)

Ukraine claims strikes destroyed over 60,000 tons of Russian naval ammunition at a Baltic Fleet arsenal near St. Petersburg, and that Russia is relocating air defense systems to Moscow and Kerch Bridge area. (Source: @UkraineNow/82148)

Russian drone attack on a five-story building in Gorlovka collapsed an apartment entrance killing three people; 10 residents were in the affected section at time of impact. (Source: @tass_agency/382224)
Russian drone attacks hit a gas station near Sumy injuring three civilians and struck a beach in Zaporizhzhia injuring four including three children. (Source: @UkraineNow/82145)

President Zelensky stated Belarusian relay equipment helping Russia adjust fire on Ukraine stopped operating from June 22; he gave Lukashenko an ultimatum to disable it within a week. (Source: @UkraineNow/82151)

At least 26 non-combat deaths of recruits in the 'Skala' assault regiment have occurred since end of 2025 due to beatings and abuse; the recruit camp was mined along the perimeter. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31118)
sections.threat_assessment: The conflict is intensifying across multiple axes with Russian forces escalating offensive activity on Lyman, Kupyansk, South-Slobozhansk, and North-Slobozhansk directions. Civilian infrastructure remains a target with drone strikes on a Sumy gas station and Zaporizhzhia beach causing casualties including children. Ukraine's claimed strike on a major Russian ammunition depot near St. Petersburg, if confirmed, represents a significant deep-strike capability demonstration. The mandatory evacuation of 12 Chernigov border settlements indicates Ukrainian military assessment of escalating threat in the northern border region adjacent to both Russia's Bryansk and Belarus's Gomel regions.
sections.regional_response: Poland has begun denying temporary protection status to Ukrainians arriving from regions not affected by military action, signaling a tightening of refugee policy. US Secretary of Defense Driscoll announced creation of two training grounds to simulate Ukraine conflict conditions for electronic warfare training and joint drone manufacturer-countermeasure developer work. Polish Prime Minister Tusk stated he would inform European leaders about the situation on the Russian-Ukrainian front and the dispute following President Zelensky's decision to name a Ukrainian military unit after UPA heroes, which Poland considers unacceptable. President Zelensky issued an ultimatum to Lukashenko to disable Belarusian relay equipment aiding Russian fire adjustment within one week.
sections.intelligence_notes: The reported cessation of Belarusian relay equipment operations from June 22 is a significant development if confirmed, as this equipment assists Russia in adjusting fire on Ukrainian targets; however, Zelensky noted it remains unknown whether the equipment was dismantled or merely switched off. The 'Skala' assault regiment investigation reveals serious internal discipline issues within Ukrainian forces with at least 26 non-combat deaths attributed to beatings and abuse, compounded by mining of the recruit camp perimeter. Russian volunteer drone operator training under the 'BARS' detachment at Ministry of Defense facilities indicates institutionalization of drone warfare capabilities. The reported destruction of over 60,000 tons of Russian naval ammunition near St. Petersburg, attributed to internal Russian documents obtained by GUR specialists, would represent a major logistics disruption if verified.
